title: The Braid Word
description: The evidence narrows things down — but not all the way. Mark every potion this pair could still produce.

hints.text: Find every potion ing1+ing6 can possibly produce, given the 8 remaining candidate alchemical(s) for ing1 and 4 for ing6. Apply the mixing rule (R→G→B): the first color where both share the same sign AND have different sizes gives the potion; if all colors are skipped, the result is neutral.

Color-by-color analysis:
  R: ing1=R+ or R-, ing6=R+ or R- — R- or R+ possible (or skip)
  G: ing1=G+ or G-, ing6=G- (confirmed) — G- possible (or skip)
  B: ing1=B+ or B-, ing6=B+ or B- — B- or B+ possible (or skip)
  → Neutral: possible when no color finds a mixed-size pair
